title: Got a Traffic Challan in Delhi NCR? Here's How to Legally Pay Less
excerpt: A Delhi traffic challan can cost thousands, but you don't have to pay the full amount. Here's how Lok Adalat settlement works and how to get a legal challan discount.

title: What Happens If You Don't Pay a Traffic Challan in India?
excerpt: Ignoring a traffic challan is one of the costliest mistakes a vehicle owner can make. Here's what actually happens, and how to fix it before it escalates.

title: Court Challan vs Online Challan, What's the Difference?
excerpt: Not all traffic challans are the same. Know the difference between an e-challan and a court challan, and what your legal options are for each.

title: How to Check Pending Challan in Delhi (4 Ways That Actually Work)
excerpt: Not sure if you have pending challans? Here are 4 free ways to check your vehicle's challan status in Delhi — including what to do once you find them.

title: What is Lok Adalat? How It Can Cut Your Traffic Fine by 50%
excerpt: Lok Adalat is the legal route thousands of Delhi drivers use to settle traffic challans at a reduced amount. Here's exactly how it works and who qualifies.

title: Best Motor Insurance in India 2025: How to Choose & Save up to 85%
excerpt: Confused by dozens of motor insurance plans? Here's how to compare car, bike and commercial vehicle policies, what really matters, and how to save up to 85% on renewal.

title: How to Claim Motor Insurance After an Accident (Step-by-Step)
